title: Reproducible code for: Direct VLBI Detection of Interstellar Turbulence Imprint on a Quasar: TXS 2005+403
description: Julia code and Makefile-based reproducible pipeline for the analysis in Plavin et al, 2026, 'Direct VLBI Detection of Interstellar Turbulence Imprint on a Quasar: TXS 2005+403'. Performs model fitting to VLBI visibility data, characterizes frequency-dependent angular broadening due to interstellar scattering, and conducts fringe fitting on archival VLBA observations of TXS 2005+403. Generates all key publication figures.
